title: Left/right align text
excerpt: I see discussions in the forum expressing a lot of interest, but haven’t found any updates. For text columns, we want to be able to left (or right) justify the text.

posts.author: shevan (Sheila VanLyke)
posts.cookedHtml:
I see discussions in the forum expressing a lot of interest, but haven’t found any updates. For text columns, we want to be able to left (or right) justify the text.

Left / Right text align Feature requests
Back to check in on this one. Still can’t understand the lack of left-aligning. The center align is so awkward with presenting info on dashboards. Any update on this Monday.com?

posts.author: abby.filliben (Abby Filliben)
posts.cookedHtml: Echoing this to hopefully get more visibility! Would love the ability to change the text alignment within cells of columns (left, center, or right alignment)!

posts.author: Marty01 (Marty)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey guys - go and vote on this one too Left / Right text align
